EACH SIDE TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER TO CONTESTDEPT.302TR@SFTC.ORG AND TO COPY EACH OTHER. JUDGE: STEPHEN MURPHY; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
